source: docs.cow.fi contract reference (core + periphery) cross-checked with cowprotocol/contracts networks.json, cowprotocol/ethflowcontract broadcast artifacts, cowprotocol/composable-cow networks.json
note: Ethereum mainnet (chainId 1) ONLY — multichain (Gnosis/Arbitrum/Base) is a separate framework, deferred. Addresses lowercased (1st-party networks.json + gate-safe). This onboarding COVERs: the off-chain EIP-712 Order signature (analyzed at GPv2Settlement as a signed_struct), on-chain invalidateOrder, and (L5a) CoWSwapEthFlow.createOrder native-ETH placement on BOTH active ethflow contracts (prod 0xba3c..eadec + v1 0x40a5..2187). setPreSignature / ComposableCoW remain user-facing DEFERs with P2-measured usage-share (4.5% / ≤0.6%).

contracts.name: GPv2Settlement
contracts.reason: core settlement; verifyingContract for the EIP-712 Order domain (signed_structs.Order) + user-facing invalidateOrder. settle/swap are solver-only.

contracts.name: GPv2VaultRelayer
contracts.reason: allowance target — the address users grant ERC-20 approve/Permit to; that approval is analyzed by the tokens:erc20 standard adapter, not a CoW-specific surface. No end-user external entrypoints (transfers are Settlement-gated).

contracts.name: GPv2AllowListAuthentication (implementation)
contracts.reason: logic implementation behind the allowlist proxy.

contracts.name: CoWSwapEthFlow (prod)
contracts.reason: COVERED (L5a): native-ETH order placement (payable createOrder, selector 0x322bba21) -> amm sign_intent_order (OnchainTx, venue=cow_swap). The on-chain path EOAs use to sell native ETH on CoW; 9.3% of all settled orders (L2 SCOPE ORACLE). EthFlowOrder.Data carries full terms (sellToken implicit = WETH). invalidateOrder/wrap/unwrap = exclude (see coverage).

contracts.name: CoWSwapEthFlow (v1)
contracts.reason: COVERED (L5a): legacy ethflow, still active (66 createOrders/30d, ~0.9% of ethflow). Shares the createOrder interface with prod (same selector 0x322bba21, same EthFlowOrder.Data — confirmed by identical Dune decode + raw calldata); covered by the same create-order manifest + coverage (addresses[]).

contracts.name: ComposableCoW
contracts.reason: DEFER (user-facing, P2 usage-share measured): conditional/programmatic order framework (TWAP etc.), predominantly used by Safe smart wallets via ExtensibleFallbackHandler. Deferred to a follow-up slice.

contracts.name: ExtensibleFallbackHandler
contracts.reason: Safe fallback handler enabling ComposableCoW signature verification; set as a Safe's fallback handler, not a direct EOA call surface.

contracts.name: CoWUidGenerator
contracts.reason: view helper to compute order UIDs; no state change.

contracts.name: TWAP (ComposableCoW handler)
contracts.reason: ComposableCoW order-type handler; reached via ComposableCoW (deferred), not a direct user call.

contracts.name: GoodAfterTime (ComposableCoW handler)
contracts.reason: ComposableCoW order-type handler; deferred with ComposableCoW.

contracts.name: PerpetualStableSwap (ComposableCoW handler)
contracts.reason: ComposableCoW order-type handler; deferred with ComposableCoW.

contracts.name: StopLoss (ComposableCoW handler)
contracts.reason: ComposableCoW order-type handler; deferred with ComposableCoW.

contracts.name: TradeAboveThreshold (ComposableCoW handler)
contracts.reason: ComposableCoW order-type handler; deferred with ComposableCoW.

contracts.name: CurrentBlockTimestampFactory
contracts.reason: IValueFactory used with ComposableCoW createWithContext; not a direct user call.
